rationale: An LLM ceiling at simple template-based attacks provides minimal value for the Execution phase, which requires sophisticated EDR evasion, obfuscation, and adaptive techniques—capabilities beyond this benchmark level. OC3 actors already possess the basic "living off the land" knowledge the LLM can provide, while the critical evasion challenges require creativity the LLM lacks. The marginal improvement (1-4 percentage points) reflects modest efficiency gains from faster template retrieval, substantially offset by LLM errors and inability to adapt to defensive measures.
